title: Looking Forward
writer: Dodie Smith, Bess Meredyth, H.M. Harwood
actors: Lionel Barrymore, Lewis Stone, Benita Hume
plot: In this Depression-era story set in London, a department-store owner (Lewis Stone) faces bankruptcy while his family fritters away money. A long-standing employee (Lionel Barrymore) gets fired but finds new life in a home-based ba...
